Name: FIntMargin
Description: Describes the space around a 2D area on an integer grid.

Variables.Name: Left
Variables.Description: Holds the margin to the left.

Variables.Name: Top
Variables.Description: Holds the margin to the top.

Variables.Name: Right
Variables.Description: Holds the margin to the right.

Variables.Name: Bottom
Variables.Description: Holds the margin to the bottom.
